title: Consistent Held Items
description: Fixes many inconsistencies with item models such as fence gates in first person
body:
# Note
Find updated versions in [Small Held Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items)

# Showcase
### First Person Changes
- Crafter, Vault, Command Block, Chiseled Bookshelf, Calibrated Sculk Sensor, End Portal Frame, Glazed Terracottas, Fence Gates, Buttons, Stonecutter, Grindstone, Big Dripleaf, Decorated Pots, and all Skulls & Heads, Dried Ghast

![Fixes first person fence gates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/173853db37ecaa357e16849aac5a4483468c758d.png)
![Fixes first person terracotta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/3afc4a18c6c40b10c93a807965ffd31232dc849f.png)
![Makes all flat laying first person models like block models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/e94358dbfb9c95fc0d69a34271913f185f975990.png)

### GUI Changes
- Glazed Terracottas, & Grindstone

![Terracotta in inventory is flipped around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/2246357a470521b889c46eccf7926205d6aff67a.png)

### Third Person Changes
- Fences, Calibrated Sculk Sensor, Anvil, Buttons, Grindstone, Stairs, both Dripleafs, Decorated Pots, & Chests

![Fences in third person held like fence gates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/d0b5817a4818aa0f034a3196403e5a16ef4bb964.png)
![Dripleaf held like a block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/bc0b96cf48447e08c067b1fd92b406dbbde05f1a.png)
![Chest changed to be held like other items (e.g. furnces)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3AdXacca/images/24c20406fe540b50d08fddf2b401de858f1be552.png)

### Things Still Inconsistent
- Small Dripleaf first person - Lighting errors
- Skulls in third person - Messes up servers that use them on armor stands
- Anvils in gui - Looks weird
